parameters.name: user-id
parameters.description: The encoded ID of the user. Use "-" (dash) for current logged-in user.

response_fields.name: user : aboutMe
response_fields.description: The "About Me" information specified in the user's account settings.

response_fields.name: user : age
response_fields.description: The age based on their specified birthday in the user's account settings.

response_fields.name: user : ambassador
response_fields.description: Supported: true | false

response_fields.name: user : autoStrideEnabled
response_fields.description: Supported: true | false

response_fields.name: user : avatar
response_fields.description: The user's avatar picture displayed as 100 pixels square.

response_fields.name: user : avatar150
response_fields.description: The user's avatar picture displayed as 150 pixels square.

response_fields.name: user : avatar640
response_fields.description: The user's avatar picture displayed as 640 pixels square.

response_fields.name: user : averageDailySteps
response_fields.description: Average daily steps calculated for the user.

response_fields.name: user : challengesBeta
response_fields.description: Supported: true | false

response_fields.name: user : city
response_fields.description: The city specified in the user's account settings. Location scope is required to see this value.

response_fields.name: user : clockTimeDisplayFormat
response_fields.description: Supported: 12hour | 24hour

response_fields.name: user : country
response_fields.description: The country specified in the user's account settings. Location scope is required to see this value.

response_fields.name: user : corporate
response_fields.description: Supported: true | false

response_fields.name: user : corporateAdmin
response_fields.description: Supported: true | false

response_fields.name: user : dateOfBirth
response_fields.description: The birthday date specified in the user's account settings.

response_fields.name: user : displayName
response_fields.description: The name shown when the user's friends look at their Fitbit profile, send a message, or other interactions within the Friends section of the Fitbit app or fitbit.com dashboard, such as challenges.

response_fields.name: user : displayNameSetting
response_fields.description: Returns the displayName's attribute. Supported: name | username

response_fields.name: user : distanceUnit
response_fields.description: The unit system defined in the user's account settings. See Localization .

response_fields.name: user : encodedId
response_fields.description: The ID representing the Fitbit user.

response_fields.name: user : features : exerciseGoal
response_fields.description: Supported: true | false

response_fields.name: user : firstName
response_fields.description: The first name value specified in the user's account settings.

response_fields.name: user : foodsLocale
response_fields.description: The locale defined in the user's account settings. See Localization . Nutrition scope is required to see this value.

response_fields.name: user : fullName
response_fields.description: The full name value specified in the user's account settings.

response_fields.name: user : gender
response_fields.description: The user's specified gender. Supported: MALE | FEMALE | NA

response_fields.name: user : glucloseUnit
response_fields.description: The unit system defined in the user's account settings. See Localization .

response_fields.name: user : height
response_fields.description: The height value specified in the user's account settings.

response_fields.name: user : heightUnit
response_fields.description: The unit system defined in the user's account settings. See Localization .

response_fields.name: user : isBugReportEnabled
response_fields.description: Supported: true | false

response_fields.name: user : isChild
response_fields.description: Supported: true | false

response_fields.name: user : isCoach
response_fields.description: Supported: true | false

response_fields.name: user : languageLocale
response_fields.description: The language locale defined in the user's account settings. See Localization .

response_fields.name: user : lastName
response_fields.description: The last name value specified in the user's account settings.

response_fields.name: user : legalTermsAcceptRequired
response_fields.description: Supported: true | false

response_fields.name: user : locale
response_fields.description: The locale defined in the user's account settings. See Localization .

response_fields.name: user : memberSince
response_fields.description: The date the user created their Fitbit account.

response_fields.name: user : mfaEnabled
response_fields.description: Supported: true | false

response_fields.name: user : offsetFromUTCMillis
response_fields.description: The timezone offset in milliseconds from UTC.

response_fields.name: user : phoneNumber
response_fields.description: Multi-factor Authentication is required to see this value.

response_fields.name: user : sdkDeveloper
response_fields.description: Supported: true | false

response_fields.name: user : sleepTracking
response_fields.description: The sleep sensitivity defined in the user's account settings. Supported: Normal | Sensitive

response_fields.name: user : startDayOfWeek
response_fields.description: The day the week begins as defined in the user's account settings. Supported: SUNDAY | MONDAY

response_fields.name: user : state
response_fields.description: Location scope is required to see this value.

response_fields.name: user : strideLengthRunning
response_fields.description: The stride length value specified in the unit system defined in the user's account settings. See Localization .

response_fields.name: user : strideLengthRunningType
response_fields.description: Specifies if the user's stride length is determined automatically (default) or manually as defined in the user's account settings. Supported: default | manual

response_fields.name: user : strideLengthWalking
response_fields.description: The stride length value specified in the unit system defined in the user's account settings. See Localization .

response_fields.name: user : strideLengthWalkingType
response_fields.description: Specifies if the user's stride length is determined automatically (default) or manually as defined in the user's account settings. Supported: default | manual

response_fields.name: user : swimUnit
response_fields.description: The unit system defined in the user's account settings. See Localization .

response_fields.name: user : temperatureUnit
response_fields.description: The unit system defined in the user's account settings. See Localization .

response_fields.name: user : timezone
response_fields.description: The timezone defined in the user's account settings.

response_fields.name: user : topBadges
response_fields.description: An array listing the Fitbit badges currently earned by the user.

response_fields.name: user : waterUnit
response_fields.description: The unit system defined in the user's account settings. See Localization . Nutrition scope is required to see this value.

response_fields.name: user : waterUnitName
response_fields.description: The unit of measure defined by the waterUnit metric. See Localization . Nutrition scope is required to see this value.

response_fields.name: user : weight
response_fields.description: The user's current weight defined by the weightUnit metric. Body scope is required to see this value.

response_fields.name: user : weightUnit
response_fields.description: The unit system defined in the user's account settings. See Localization .
